arts.sum: After a highly successful 2024-25 season, FC Barcelona are set to return to action for the 2025-26 season tonight as they face Mallorca at the Son Moix. arts.sum: FC Barcelona have released their first squad list of the 2025/26 season for the match against Mallorca, with La Liga confirming the shirt numbers of the players. arts.ttl: Barcelona spring huge Marcus Rashford SURPRISE: Man Utd star travels to Mallorca after BAN threat
arts.sum: After Rashford was signed on a loan deal from Manchester United, the Catalan side had major headaches getting him registered in time to play the opening competitive match of the season. Joan Garcia, who signed from Espanyol in a high-profile summer deal, will start in goal as Marc-Andre ter Stegen is missing due to injury while Wojciech Szczesny is another player who is not registered yet.
